scripts.install:deps: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && python3 -m pip install -e apps/api
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/shared-schema typecheck && pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/shared-schema build && pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/web typecheck
scripts.validate: pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/shared-schema typecheck && pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/shared-schema build && pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/shared-schema validate:fixtures && pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/web build && pnpm --filter @ppt-pilot/web smoke-start && python3 -m compileall apps/api/app && PYTHONPATH=apps/api python3 -m app.shared_schema_smoke && PYTHONPATH=apps/api python3 -c "from app.main import app, health_check; paths = {route.path for route in app.routes}; assert '/health' in paths; result = health_check(); assert result['status'] == 'ok'; assert result['service'] == 'ppt-pilot-api'"
